flags.label: Debt-to-earnings
flags.summary: Debt-to-earnings ratio of 8.2% at Provo College exceeds the 8% gainful-employment threshold ($24.3k debt amortized over 10 years vs $39.6k earnings).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Provo College rose 110% between 2017 and 2020 ($19.9k → $41.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Provo College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Provo College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 (38.7% → 51.3%).
